description: Trace SCRAM authentication nonce validation path in Apache Kafka
local_clone_commands: git clone --depth 1 https://github.com/sg-evals/kafka--0cd95bc2.git kafka && echo "Kafka repository at pre-fix commit (vulnerable SCRAM nonce validation)"

git clone https://github.com/apache/kafka.git && cd kafka && git checkout 0cd95bc2d82106ea9fb36061d8419f7fc9051d69 && git log -1 --oneline | grep -q "0cd95bc" && echo "Kafka repository at pre-fix commit (vulnerable SCRAM nonce validation)"
dependency_hints: apt-get update && apt-get install -y --no-install-recommends git jq bc python3 && rm -rf /var/lib/apt/lists/*
apt-get update && apt-get install -y --no-install-recommends git ca-certificates python3 curl && rm -rf /var/lib/apt/lists/*
